rules.rule: visual publication builds MUST be written under operational-console/visual-publication-builds/<state>/<build_id>/ — NEVER into the live publication tree.
outputs are deterministic: identical inputs MUST yield byte-identical manual.html and manual.json.
every visual placement MUST carry grounding_id + image_id + role + evidence_ids.
supported output formats: html, json. PDF is out-of-scope for this layer.
synthesis_id MUST resolve to a layer-41 synthesis manifest.
publication-ready promotion is blocked when any required image role is missing or when continuity check fails.
